data.name: MobileAppClient
data.value:
We need 3D space,
can be visited through mobile apps,
That allows our customers to know our business

data.name: TLCClient
data.value:
We have a telecommunications company and
we need support to automatically configure e
In real time all our systems.

data.name: SystemIntegrationClient
data.value: Corporate Systems Integration is Graldev’s motto and is the main answer that our company is ready to provide to its customers. </br>If your problem is getting different systems to talk to each other or exchanging data between software or hardware that doesn’t normally talk to each other, then you need our help. </br>We have been dealing with Systems Integration for decades and over time we have faced and won countless challenges in various fields of action. </br> Many companies have turned to us and are successfully addressing us. Contact us to arrange a meeting and to find a reliable answer for your needs!

data.name: AmazonClient
data.value:
We sell on eBay and Amazon and we need a whole system that
align our business software with sales data and create reports

data.name: GestClient
data.value:
We are an automotive company and we need software
which allows our assistance network to stock and manage all our equipment

data.name: ARClient
data.value:
We are a cultural association and
we need an application that allows us to talk about the countries of our land in a new way,
with the help of augmented reality

data.name: MarketingClient
data.value:
We are wine producers/retailers and we would need an effective social media marketing strategy
to attract the highest number of potential customers

data.name: SocialNClient
data.value:
We are an expanding company and we would like to make ourselves known also through social channels.
We would therefore need someone to manage our Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X and TikTok profiles.

data.name: KnowMore
data.value:
Do you want to know more?
Do not hesitate
to contact us

data.name: OKClient
data.value: Done!

data.name: TlcclientTitle
data.value:
IT Support and
Consulting - TLC

data.name: GestClientTitle
data.value: Management Software

data.name: MarketingClientTitle
data.value: Marketing Campaigns

data.name: MissionClient
data.value:
Our mission is to make IT systems, already existing or to be created, which normally do not speak to each other, communicate with each other.
To better explain this concept, there is no better way than to give some examples of what our customers have asked of us and we have achieved:

data.name: canHelpClient
data.value: Do you want to know if we can help you?

data.name: TitleClientsection
data.value: Why contact us

data.name: SysModal
data.value:
Corporate Systems Integration is the motto of Graldev and is the main answer that our company is ready to provide to its customers.

If your problem is getting different systems to talk to each other or exchanging data between software or hardware that doesn’t normally talk to each other, then you need our help.

We have been dealing with Systems Integration for decades and over time we have faced and won countless challenges in various fields of action.

Many companies have turned to us and are successfully addressing us. Contact us to organize a meeting and to find a reliable answer for your needs!


Some examples:

  • Development of software for the configuration and management of fixed and/or mobile telephone lines for a large telecommunications company
  • Creation of computer tools to collect, group and present data provided in real time by industrial printing machines
  • Realization of Integration channels, within Online Games Web Portals, with external systems through the use or implementation of Web Services, REST APIs and other custom communication tools

data.name: AppsModal
data.value:
Our main target are medium-large business realities. In this context we have accumulated a lot of experience in the realization of Mobile App and Web Applications for the most diverse purposes.

We make Apps for iOS/Android both in native languages (Swift/Java) and using pre-existing frameworks.

In recent years we have specialized in using different tools for making Videogames and Gamifications in 3D (Unreal Engine / Roblox), 2D (RPG Maker) and other tools such as Microsoft Power Apps.

We are also involved in the scholastic dissemination of the culture of making the video game in order to give the tools and knowledge to the kids to become an active part in this world!


Some examples:

  • Creation of a web application for the stock management of all the national workshops of an international car manufacturer
  • Making native iOS/Android apps for online gaming
  • Creation of an iOS App for registering customers with integrated FES and FEA for an international client

data.name: CartModal
data.value:
Some companies and factories that sell large volumes of goods online have turned to us to speed up and improve the sales experience through the most used channels such as Amazon, eBay or Shopify.

We have created a tool, Geordie, which allows to integrate all the production phases, creating the insertions in a massive way, managing the products in the windows, communication with customers and sales on the Web starting from the assembly line up to the finished product and packed with the creation of the destination labels to be affixed on the packages in departure.

In addition, we have our staff already prepared to manage the needs of interaction with end customers.

We have therefore created a multifunctional tool, highly customizable and integrated, which has reduced the time and costs of our customers.


Some examples:

  • Geordie realization for interfacing between industrial machines for the production of products for car interiors
  • Geordie realization for sale, reporting and communication 24/365 with the Amazon and eBay Web APIs for a customer who produces products for cars
  • Creating an interface between a customer’s ERP and their own store on Shopify

data.name: SupportModal
data.value:
Some of us have been living in computer science since the '80s while others have been born and grown up already wrapped up in the culture of computer science 360.

We are ready to help you in every aspect to create a multi-user software or a solution entirely on the Cloud, or simply to explain to you what might be the best business infrastructure for your business.

Let’s meet and talk!

data.name: GestModal
data.value:
Management software is perhaps the most requested and necessary tool for companies.

We do not propose customizations of ready-made tools but we realize just the tool you need, with all the customizations you want.

Book a meeting with us and together we think and design the most suitable tool for the needs of your company.

Then we will realize it from scratch, without compromises and without pre-built packages. Only what you need and in the most useful form, online or on intranet.

data.name: ARModal
data.value:
We have developed our own Augmented Reality tool and can easily insert it into your infrastructure.

We can enrich your public tools like Web Sites or Web Applications with 3D realizations or even realize your entire Web world in 3D.

Contact us and meet us for a DEMO of our tools and our achievements!


Some examples:

  • Webapp development for a cultural association that, by scanning Qr code, displays educational videos in AR
  • 3D modelling for Websites and/or mobile applications
  • Realization of Virtual Tour 360 ibility for webapp and/or Oculus

data.value: What is it?
